evals.name: project-status
evals.prompt: Here's my project status spreadsheet (test-data/project-status.xlsx) for our AI chatbot initiative. Can you turn this into a dashboard I can show the director on Friday? She just wants to glance at it and know where things stand.
evals.expected_output: Single HTML file with KPI cards for overall progress / chatbot completion, a budget KPI or chart, a team utilization chart or table, progress bars for completion percentages, and a risk table with status pills (On Track / Watching / At Risk).
expectations: Output is a single self-contained HTML file that opens in a browser with no build step
Includes at least one KPI card showing a progress/completion percentage from the source data
Includes a progress bar element for at least one completion percentage
Includes a risk table listing the 3 risks from the source sheet with a status indicator per row (At Risk / Watching / On Track)
All numeric values in the output (budget figures, percentages) match values derivable from the source workbook, not invented numbers
Includes some visualization (chart or bar) of team utilization across the 3 teams

evals.name: finance-quarterly
evals.prompt: Attached is our finance data for the year (test-data/finance-quarterly.xlsx). Please build a business dashboard for leadership review - they care about revenue trend, profitability, and where revenue is coming from.
evals.expected_output: Single HTML file with KPI cards (revenue, gross profit, marketing spend, CAC, active customers), a line chart of revenue/COGS/gross profit by month, and a region breakdown chart (doughnut or bar).
expectations: Output is a single self-contained HTML file that opens in a browser with no build step
Includes KPI cards for at least 4 of: Total Revenue, Gross Profit, Marketing Spend, CAC, Active Customers
Includes a 12-month trend chart (line) plotting revenue and at least one other metric (COGS or gross profit) by month
Includes a region breakdown visualization (chart or table) showing North America, APAC, Europe, and LATAM
Monthly chart data point count matches the 12 months present in the source workbook
Numeric KPI values are human-formatted (e.g. $13.7M) rather than raw unformatted numbers (e.g. 13700000)

evals.name: sales-ops
evals.prompt: can u make a quick dashboard from this sales sheet (test-data/sales-ops.xlsx)? want to show my manager how we're tracking against goal and which stores are doing well
evals.expected_output: Single HTML file with KPI cards (total sales, customers), a progress bar or KPI showing sales vs goal, a category breakdown chart, and a per-store table with status pills.
expectations: Output is a single self-contained HTML file that opens in a browser with no build step
Includes KPI cards for Total Sales and Customers
Includes a visual showing progress toward the $16,000 sales goal (progress bar or equivalent)
Includes a category breakdown chart (e.g. doughnut or bar) across the 4 product categories
Includes a per-store table or chart with all 4 stores, flagging Airport Kiosk as At Risk / underperforming
Numeric values (sales, goal) are human-formatted with currency symbols
